items.title: USMNT's multifaceted win vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina bo...
items.summary: The U.S. has found a winning formula at this World Cup, but it had to pivot vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina. It worked, and now a World Cup run looks possible.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: After edging DR Congo, England coach Thomas Tuchel worried by ‘high altitude’ challenge against Mexico in Round of 16
items.summary: For the first time in this edition, England will cross the border from the United States into Mexico to take on an in-form team in front of its home supporters.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Can NZ manage their pace riches with India and Australia looming?
items.summary: Head selector Gavin Larsen discusses the issue of workload management ahead of a bumper Test summer
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
